# function: replace_deep

Recursively iterates through lists, maps, sets, tuples, and objects to find and replace string values.



## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
replace_deep(input dynamic, search string, replace string) dynamic
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `input` (Dynamic) The complex object or collection to process.
1. `search` (String) The string to search for.
1. `replace` (String) The string to replace the search string with.
